top_signals.title: Retail Investors Use ETFs as a Tool For Alpha: Zhang
top_signals.summary: Sylvia Zhang, executive director and assistant head of global index at E Fund Management, joins Scarlet Fu, Katie Greifeld, and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They discusses China's investor trends and its booming ETF industry. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump Bitcoin Reserve Faces Hurdles as Departments Seek Control
top_signals.summary: The Trump administration’s plan to create a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve has been complicated by two government departments vying to run it, alongside questions about which has the legal authority to do so.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Piero Cipollone: The digital transformation of money, payments and finance
